title: Will the U.S. Join the Global Majority?
description:
The war machine is definitely on a rampage, and it was clearly helped by Zelenskyy’s tour to Italy, Germany, France and Great Britain, where in each case he was showered with new weapons. I think the best characterization came from Hungary’s Foreign Minister Peter Szijjarto, who was in Beijing meeting with Chinese Foreign Minister Qin Gang, where he said the importance of the Chinese effort to gain peace is even more important since 'Europe is gripped by a war psychosis.' — Helga Zepp-LaRouche May 15, 2023

Come with your thoughts, ideas, organizing reports and questions concerning the dire need to create a peace movement in the U.S. and Europe to steer the world away from world war.

Submit your questions to questions@schillerinstitute.org or write them in the YouTube chat during the live broadcast on Wednesday, May 17 at 11am EDT, 5pm CET.
